# Daily Report — 2026-05-04

## Task Completed
Implemented `create_catalog_item_variable_set` tool. Variable sets (`item_option_new_set`)
group catalog item variables into labelled sections on the request form. The tool:
- POSTs to `/api/now/table/item_option_new_set` to create the set record (local or global)
- When `catalog_item_id` is supplied, immediately POSTs a junction record to
  `/api/now/table/io_set_item` to link the set to the catalog item
- Supports `name`, `title`, `description`, `order`, `global_set`, and `active` parameters
- Returns `variable_set_id` + `link_id` so callers can immediately add variables to the set

Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and added to the `catalog_builder` and `full`
packages in `tool_packages.yaml`.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1013
- Coverage: 96%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing system-level vulnerabilities in pip, setuptools, wheel, pyjwt — not in
project code. No new vulnerabilities introduced.
